{
  "scaffolding_beads": [
    {
      "id": "bd-17s0",
      "title": "Scaffold platform/projections crate + workspace wiring",
      "description": "Create the new shared platform crate at platform/projections. Add Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs, minimal module skeleton (cursor/mod/metrics placeholders), and wire into the root Cargo workspace members so it builds in CI. No projection business logic yet.",
      "how_to_think": "Think like a Rust workspace steward. Invariant: the workspace builds deterministically with the new crate included and no cyclic deps. Failure mode to avoid: breaking the build graph or introducing accidental cross-module coupling via incorrect crate dependencies.",
      "depends_on": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        "platform/projections/Cargo.toml exists with a valid crate name and edition matching workspace",
        "platform/projections/src/lib.rs exists and compiles",
        "Root Cargo workspace includes platform/projections as a member",
        "cargo test --workspace passes with the new crate included"
      ],
      "verification_commands": [
        "cargo test --workspace",
        "All workspace tests pass"
      ],
      "estimated_complexity": 2,
      "files_involved": [
        "Cargo.toml",
        "platform/projections/Cargo.toml",
        "platform/projections/src/lib.rs",
        "platform/projections/src/cursor.rs",
        "platform/projections/src/metrics.rs"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "bd-17s1",
      "title": "Scaffold platform/audit crate + workspace wiring",
      "description": "Create the new shared platform crate at platform/audit. Add Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs, minimal module skeleton (actor/policy/diff placeholders), and wire into the root Cargo workspace members so it builds in CI. No audit DB/migrations yet.",
      "how_to_think": "Think like a compliance-platform engineer. Invariant: the audit crate is a pure shared library (no module DB imports, no cross-module dependencies). Failure mode to avoid: introducing hidden coupling or breaking workspace builds.",
      "depends_on": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        "platform/audit/Cargo.toml exists with valid crate metadata",
        "platform/audit/src/lib.rs exists and compiles",
        "Root Cargo workspace includes platform/audit as a member",
        "cargo test --workspace passes"
      ],
      "verification_commands": [
        "cargo test --workspace",
        "All workspace tests pass"
      ],
      "estimated_complexity": 2,
      "files_involved": [
        "Cargo.toml",
        "platform/audit/Cargo.toml",
        "platform/audit/src/lib.rs",
        "platform/audit/src/actor.rs",

        "platform/audit/src/diff.rs"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "bd-17s2",
      "title": "Scaffold platform/tenant-registry crate + workspace wiring",
      "description": "Create the new shared platform crate at platform/tenant-registry. Add Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs, minimal API placeholders for registry operations. Wire into the root Cargo workspace members. No DB schema/migrations yet.",
      "how_to_think": "Think like a control-plane engineer. Invariant: the tenant registry crate is buildable and dependency-safe as a reusable platform library. Failure mode to avoid: workspace breakage or pulling in module-specific crates that violate boundaries.",
      "depends_on": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        "platform/tenant-registry/Cargo.toml exists and compiles",
        "platform/tenant-registry/src/lib.rs exists and compiles",
        "Root Cargo workspace includes platform/tenant-registry as a member",
        "cargo test --workspace passes"
      ],
      "verification_commands": [
        "cargo test --workspace",
        "All workspace tests pass"

      "estimated_complexity": 2,
      "files_involved": [
        "Cargo.toml",
        "platform/tenant-registry/Cargo.toml",
        "platform/tenant-registry/src/lib.rs"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "bd-17s3",
      "title": "Scaffold tools/projection-rebuild binary + workspace wiring",
      "description": "Create the new tool at tools/projection-rebuild as a Rust binary crate. Add Cargo.toml, src/main.rs with minimal CLI skeleton and placeholder subcommands. Wire into workspace members. No rebuild logic yet.",
      "how_to_think": "Think like an ops tooling engineer. Invariant: the tool builds, runs, and can be extended without modifying module crates. Failure mode to avoid: tool accidentally importing module internals or failing CI due to workspace wiring issues.",
      "depends_on": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        "tools/projection-rebuild/Cargo.toml exists and defines a binary",
        "tools/projection-rebuild/src/main.rs builds and prints a help/usage message",
        "Root Cargo workspace includes tools/projection-rebuild as a member",
        "cargo test --workspace passes"
      ],
      "verification_commands": [
        "cargo test --workspace",
        "All workspace tests pass"
      ],
      "estimated_complexity": 2,
      "files_involved": [
        "Cargo.toml",
        "tools/projection-rebuild/Cargo.toml",

      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "bd-17s4",
      "title": "Scaffold tools/tenantctl binary + workspace wiring",
      "description": "Create the new tool at tools/tenantctl as a Rust binary crate. Add Cargo.toml, src/main.rs with minimal CLI skeleton and placeholder commands (create/verify/fleet). Wire into workspace members. No provisioning logic yet.",
      "how_to_think": "Think like a platform operations engineer. Invariant: tenantctl is a standalone ops tool and does not require tenant_id threading through runtime code. Failure mode to avoid: coupling tenant ops to module binaries or breaking the workspace build.",

      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "bd-18s0",
      "title": "Scaffold platform/security crate + workspace wiring",
      "description": "Create the new shared platform crate at platform/security. Add Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs, minimal placeholders for auth token verification, rbac, and ratelimit utilities. Wire into workspace members. No enforcement in modules yet.",
      "how_to_think": "Think like a platform security engineer. Invariant: shared security primitives compile and are reusable without leaking secrets or adding runtime side effects. Failure mode to avoid: breaking builds or introducing unsafe defaults before policy is implemented.",

        "platform/security/src/lib.rs",
        "platform/security/src/rbac.rs",
        "platform/security/src/ratelimit.rs"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "bd-18s1",
      "title": "Scaffold tools/compliance-export binary + workspace wiring",
      "description": "Create the new tool at tools/compliance-export as a Rust binary crate. Add Cargo.toml, src/main.rs with minimal CLI skeleton and placeholder export subcommand. Wire into workspace members. No export logic yet.",
      "how_to_think": "Think like a compliance tooling engineer. Invariant: the export tool compiles and can be extended to produce deterministic outputs without pulling module internals. Failure mode to avoid: build failures or hidden coupling that violates module boundaries.",

scaffolding_beads.title: Scaffold platform/projections crate + workspace wiring
scaffolding_beads.description: Create the new shared platform crate at platform/projections. Add Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs, minimal module skeleton (cursor/mod/metrics placeholders), and wire into the root Cargo workspace members so it builds in CI. No projection business logic yet.
scaffolding_beads.how_to_think: Think like a Rust workspace steward. Invariant: the workspace builds deterministically with the new crate included and no cyclic deps. Failure mode to avoid: breaking the build graph or introducing accidental cross-module coupling via incorrect crate dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: platform/projections/Cargo.toml exists with a valid crate name and edition matching workspace
platform/projections/src/lib.rs exists and compiles
Root Cargo workspace includes platform/projections as a member
cargo test --workspace passes with the new crate included

scaffolding_beads.title: Scaffold platform/audit crate + workspace wiring
scaffolding_beads.description: Create the new shared platform crate at platform/audit. Add Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs, minimal module skeleton (actor/policy/diff placeholders), and wire into the root Cargo workspace members so it builds in CI. No audit DB/migrations yet.
scaffolding_beads.how_to_think: Think like a compliance-platform engineer. Invariant: the audit crate is a pure shared library (no module DB imports, no cross-module dependencies). Failure mode to avoid: introducing hidden coupling or breaking workspace builds.
acceptance_criteria: platform/audit/Cargo.toml exists with valid crate metadata
platform/audit/src/lib.rs exists and compiles
Root Cargo workspace includes platform/audit as a member
cargo test --workspace passes

scaffolding_beads.title: Scaffold platform/tenant-registry crate + workspace wiring
scaffolding_beads.description: Create the new shared platform crate at platform/tenant-registry. Add Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs, minimal API placeholders for registry operations. Wire into the root Cargo workspace members. No DB schema/migrations yet.
scaffolding_beads.how_to_think: Think like a control-plane engineer. Invariant: the tenant registry crate is buildable and dependency-safe as a reusable platform library. Failure mode to avoid: workspace breakage or pulling in module-specific crates that violate boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: platform/tenant-registry/Cargo.toml exists and compiles
platform/tenant-registry/src/lib.rs exists and compiles
Root Cargo workspace includes platform/tenant-registry as a member
cargo test --workspace passes

scaffolding_beads.title: Scaffold tools/projection-rebuild binary + workspace wiring
scaffolding_beads.description: Create the new tool at tools/projection-rebuild as a Rust binary crate. Add Cargo.toml, src/main.rs with minimal CLI skeleton and placeholder subcommands. Wire into workspace members. No rebuild logic yet.
scaffolding_beads.how_to_think: Think like an ops tooling engineer. Invariant: the tool builds, runs, and can be extended without modifying module crates. Failure mode to avoid: tool accidentally importing module internals or failing CI due to workspace wiring issues.
acceptance_criteria: tools/projection-rebuild/Cargo.toml exists and defines a binary
tools/projection-rebuild/src/main.rs builds and prints a help/usage message
Root Cargo workspace includes tools/projection-rebuild as a member
cargo test --workspace passes

scaffolding_beads.description: Create the new tool at tools/tenantctl as a Rust binary crate. Add Cargo.toml, src/main.rs with minimal CLI skeleton and placeholder commands (create/verify/fleet). Wire into workspace members. No provisioning logic yet.
scaffolding_beads.how_to_think: Think like a platform operations engineer. Invariant: tenantctl is a standalone ops tool and does not require tenant_id threading through runtime code. Failure mode to avoid: coupling tenant ops to module binaries or breaking the workspace build.
